name: Faux Sourdough Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature before starting.
2. Add the dry ingredients (yeast, flour, salt) to the bowl first.
3. Pour in the liquid ingredients (molasses, sour cream, water, lemon juice).
4. Mix until a dough forms.
5. Select "White Bread" setting on your bread maker.
6. Press "Start" to begin baking.
7. The machine will yield 1 loaf of bread.
